summary: Excellent TypeScript/Bun code with strong modularity (pure lib.ts, I/O in cli.ts, minimal duplication). Workflow is clean and follows CI/CD patterns. Shortcomings: (1) actions/checkout@v4 should be pinned to full SHA for supply-chain security per best-practices guidance; (2) no actionlint/act validation evidence included per task requirements; (3) workflow steps could slightly tighten (e.g., awk parsing in step bump). Proper error handling, clear separation of concerns, good TypeScript typing throughout. Ship-ready aside from validation artifacts.
